positive: A whimsical, symmetrical composition featuring interconnected celestial flora and fauna. Dominant elements include stylized, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate winged spirits resembling moths and butterflies, and crescent moons forming mandalas. The overall style is neo-art deco botanical illustration mixed with cosmic vaporwave aesthetics. Use highly contrasting colors: deep indigo and midnight blue background punctuated by vibrant electric teal, soft gold highlights, and luminous lavender accents. The forms must have clean, strong silhouettes perfect for apparel printing, emphasizing intricate linework and flat, saturated color areas. Central focus, highly detailed, symmetrical composition, volumetric lighting from internal glows, graphic novel quality.
negative: blur, text, watermark, signature, logo, noisy, grain, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, ugly, out of frame, extra limbs, low resolution, washed out, grayscale, muddy colors, amateur, sketch, photorealistic
